title: digitaria abyssinica var. scalarum
intro: Digitaria abyssinica var. scalarum, also known as Digitaria scalarum, is a variety of Digitaria abyssinica, a type of grass native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Africa and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Digitaria abyssinica var. scalarum include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. In traditional herbal medicine, Digitaria abyssinica var. scalarum is often prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling the leaves and stems in water, or it can be made into a powder or capsule for easier consumption.
